TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ciwcia, title = Ciwcia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciwcia} }

S.FORM: alang Ciwcia ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 443 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 130 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 313 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 9%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciwcia hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Ciwcia hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciwcia ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwcia ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ciwcia ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 443 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 130 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 313 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 14%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 9%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciwcia hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Ciwcia hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Ciwcia hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Ciwcia hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciwcia ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ciwcia ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, ő≤unun *%, truku *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipuruŇčan. taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia ńßja Ē …£a parupu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč ¶~ ®iw ¶~ ®ia …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
